title: Assistant Store Manager - Asian Paints Signature Store - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Asian Paints Signature Store - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Asian Paints Signature Store are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Asian Paints Signature Store:
Asian Paints Signature Store is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints Signature Store!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
